records.license_review: Parser code is MIT and the AGPL source offer is implemented; managed model/runtime approval remains deployment-specific.
limitations: The managed endpoint did not expose immutable model or runtime provenance.
The invoice fixture missed the Bill To reading-order expectation.
records.notes: The real service completed 50/50 public pages and passed 3/4 quality fixtures with fallback.used=false. This is functional verification, not reproducible certification.

records.license_review: The model and relevant open-source components are Apache-2.0; NVIDIA container terms require separate deployment review.
limitations: The invoice fixture missed the Bill To reading-order expectation in Parser, direct-crop, and single-stage outputs.
mineru-vl-utils was installed at service start rather than embodied in a digest-pinned derived image.
records.notes: The pinned base vLLM runtime completed 50/50 public pages through a task-owned outage and passed 3/4 quality fixtures. The remaining failure is attributed to model reading-order quality.

records.license_review: Recognition and layout model cards declare Apache-2.0; the AGPL source offer is implemented; deployment approval remains operator-specific.
limitations: No immutable RepoDigest was produced; an image ID is not a registry digest.
The fixed base composition requires FLASHINFER_DISABLE_VERSION_CHECK=1.
Only 1/4 public quality fixtures passed; table recognition and reading order remain limited.
records.notes: The 55d2399 candidate completed all four integration fixtures after declaring Beautiful Soup, but only one met quality expectations. The source-built sglang-kernel 0.4.4 runtime loaded sgl_kernel/sm100/common_ops with SM121 gencode; this remains Verified and limited.
